knowledge.html:
I. PRONUNCIATION (PHÁT ÂM)

1. Quy tắc phát âm của các chữ cái phụ âm và phụ âm cuối

Một số chữ cái phụ âm thường gặp

Chữ cái phụ âmCách phát âmVí dụ
c/k/close, confide
/s/certify, cycle
/ʃ/special, ocean
d/d/dramatic, demand
/dʒ/gradual, educate

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Sure' bắt đầu bằng /ʃ/ (sh), còn các từ kia bắt đầu bằng /s/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Document' có /ɒ/ cho 'o', còn các từ kia (stroll, control, remote) có /əʊ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Average' có /æ/ cho 'a', còn 'wave', 'pavement', 'range' có /eɪ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'But' có /ʌ/ cho 'u', còn sugar, put, full có /ʊ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Considered' kết thúc bằng âm /d/. Các từ kia kết thúc bằng /t/ vì theo sau phụ âm không rung.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Leather' có /e/ cho 'ea', còn stream, cream, dream có /iː/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Medicine' có /e/ cho 'e' đầu, còn các từ khác có /iː/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Bury' phát âm /e/, còn hurry, hungry, thunder có /ʌ/. Đây là từ đặc biệt.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Worked' có -ed phát âm /t/ (sau /k/). Các từ khác có /ɪd/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Instead' có /e/ cho 'ea', còn beach, clean, leave có /iː/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Impressed' có -ed = /t/ (sau /s/). Các từ khác có -ed = /d/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Nature' có /eɪ/ cho 'a', còn planet, fashion, travel có /æ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Donate' có /əʊ/ cho 'o', còn hut, done, tunnel có /ʌ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Parachute' có 'ch' = /ʃ/, còn chemistry, mechanic, character có 'ch' = /k/. Đây là từ gốc Hy Lạp.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Reduced' có -ed = /t/ (sau /s/). Các từ khác có -ed = /d/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Leather' có 'ea' = /e/, còn breathe, decrease, beach có 'ea' = /iː/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Cow' có 'ow' = /aʊ/, còn mow, low, show có /əʊ/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Speaks' có -s = /s/ (sau /k/). Các từ khác có -s = /z/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Patient' có 'ti' = /ʃ/ (trước -ent), còn invite, faint, victim có /t/.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Award' có 'a' = /ə/, còn candidate, understand, examine có 'a' = /æ/.
